display.purpose: Identity moments only: the serif-italic wordmark and hero headlines. Playfair appears once or twice per viewport, no more.

body.purpose: Prose, FAQ answers, descriptions. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons and nav items, set as UPPERCASE copy. Wayfinding only.

mono.purpose: Inline code in writing posts. Never decorative.

gradients.name: the-ember
gradients.purpose: Footer-only aurora glow behind the wordmark: blurred 20px, 70% opacity, bottom-masked, grain overlay. The site's single sanctioned burst of saturated color (The Ember Rule). Never reuse these hues as UI color.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Barely-there lift for small floating elements.

shadows.name: floating-surface
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and popovers. Static regions use hairline borders instead.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Once-per-element scroll reveal used across sections.

motion.name: link-color
motion.purpose: Prose link and nav hover transitions.

motion.name: marquee
motion.purpose: Logo strip loop; pause under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: blur-recede
motion.value: filter 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease (siblings: blur(1px) + 50% opacity)
motion.purpose: List hover focus: non-hovered items recede.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Square ink-filled CTA with uppercase label; the main conversion affordance (EVENTS FORM).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); color: var(--background, #f2f1e8); font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--foreground, #2b2b2b) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #a3a091) 50%, transparent); border-color: var(--ring, #a3a091); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Hairline-bordered transparent button; the default nav affordance (ABOUT, EVENTS).
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dcd9c9); border-radius: 0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted, #e8e6da); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #a3a091) 50%, transparent); border-color: var(--ring, #a3a091); }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Sticky cream bar: serif-italic wordmark left, square buttons right.
components.html: CHELSEA COMMONS
components.css: .ds-nav { background: var(--background, #f2f1e8); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 24px; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-family: 'Playfair Display Variable', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; } .ds-nav-btn { background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #dcd9c9); border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-btn:hover { background: var(--muted, #e8e6da); } .ds-nav-btn--fill { background: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); color: var(--background, #f2f1e8); border-color: transparent; } .ds-nav-btn--fill:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--foreground, #2b2b2b) 90%, transparent); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface-cream sheet with hairline border and gentle 10px rounding; no shadow at rest.
components.html:
Summer Mixer

Rooftop drinks with the cohort and friends of the house. Casual, no agenda.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--card, #f7f6ee); border: 1px solid var(--border, #dcd9c9); border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; max-width: 340px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.125rem; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6a62); margin: 0; }

components.name: Prose Link
components.description: Ink link, underline on hover, 300ms transition; inverted selection is a system signature.
components.html: Come to an event — sign up on our events page.
components.css: .ds-prose { font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); } .ds-prose ::selection { background: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); color: var(--background, #f2f1e8); } .ds-link { color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s ease; } .ds-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Row
components.description: Hairline-divided question row with body-weight answer; single-open behavior in the app.
components.html: A community of young, ambitious builders, operators, and founders in New York.
components.css: .ds-faq { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #dcd9c9); max-width: 420px; font-family: 'Neue Montreal', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; } .ds-faq-q { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; width: 100%; background: none; border: none; padding: 16px 0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground, #2b2b2b); cursor: pointer; text-align: left; } .ds-faq-q:hover { color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6a62); } .ds-faq-icon { font-weight: 400; color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6a62); } .ds-faq-a { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--muted-foreground, #6b6a62); margin: 0; padding: 0 0 16px; }

narrative.overview: The system is a shared living room in a Chelsea brownstone rendered as a website: warm paper walls, dark ink, photographs pinned up, partner logos drifting past like conversation. Everything sits on one continuous cream surface (#f2f1e8) with soft charcoal ink (#2b2b2b) — no pure white, no pure black — so the whole site reads as a single printed object rather than a stack of app screens. The serif italic wordmark against square, uppercase sans buttons gives it the collegiate-editorial tension of young people borrowing old forms and making them their own. The system explicitly rejects SaaS startup-landing mechanics (hero metrics, feature grids, gradient CTAs), hacker-house terminal aesthetics (neon-on-dark, hustle energy), and sterile luxury-beige minimalism. Warmth is carried by photography (halftone hero treatments, candid event photos) and voice — the cream field is the paper it's printed on, not the personality itself.
keyCharacteristics: One continuous cream paper surface; depth from hairline borders, not shadows
Serif italic reserved for identity moments; workhorse grotesque (Neue Montreal) everywhere else
Square-cornered, uppercase-labeled buttons; rounded corners reserved for imagery and cards
Photography-led: halftone treatments, candid event photos, marquee logo strips
Quiet, brief motion: 0.3s fades, infinite marquees, blur-recede hover states

rules.name: The One Paper Rule
rules.body: Every page shares the same cream field — no alternating white/gray section stripes, no dark-mode sections dropped into the scroll. Section rhythm comes from hairline top-borders and spacing, never background changes.

rules.name: The Inverted Selection Rule
rules.body: Text selection flips the palette (ink background, cream text). It's a signature micro-detail; keep it.

rules.name: The Ember Rule
rules.body: The footer's aurora gradient is the site's single sanctioned burst of saturated color — the fire at the end of the evening. It appears once, in the footer send-off, always blurred and masked, never as sharp-edged UI color. Everywhere outside the footer, Signal Red remains the only saturated color.

rules.name: The Rare Serif Rule
rules.body: Playfair is the brand's signature, and signatures appear once. Wordmark, hero, maybe a pull-quote — everything else is Neue Montreal.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Is-Wayfinding Rule
rules.body: All-caps is only for short navigational labels (nav links, buttons). Never for headings or body copy.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: If you're reaching for a shadow to separate two static regions, use a hairline border instead. Shadows are for things that float above the paper, and paper rarely floats.

dos: Do keep every page on the single Cream field (#f2f1e8) — section rhythm comes from hairline top-borders (border-t, #dcd9c9) and 64px vertical padding.
Do keep buttons square (0px radius) with uppercase 0.875rem labels; keep cards and imagery gently rounded (10px). The contrast is the system.
Do reserve Playfair italic for identity moments (wordmark, hero) and let Neue Montreal carry everything else.
Do lead with photography — halftone hero treatments, candid event photos, real partner logos. People are the proof.
Do keep motion brief and quiet: 0.3s ease fades with ~15px rise, triggered once per element; marquees linear and slow.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for every animation (marquee, aurora, scroll reveals, velocity text).
donts: Don't import SaaS startup-landing mechanics — hero metrics, feature grids, gradient CTAs, "Join 10,000+ builders" counters.
Don't drift toward hacker-house tropes — terminal aesthetics, neon-on-dark, monospace-as-personality. Geist Mono is for code, not costume.
Don't let the palette go sterile-luxury-beige — if a section has no photograph, no person, and no voice, the cream field alone will read as an empty template.
Don't use pure white (#ffffff) or pure black (#000000) anywhere; the palette's warmth lives in the offsets.
Don't round button corners or add colored side-stripe borders to cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't lighten Faded Ink (#6b6a62) or set body copy in it at sizes below 1rem — it's the AA floor, not a starting point.
Don't introduce new saturated colors; Signal Red is the only saturated UI color ("destructive"), and The Ember gradient lives only in the footer.
